onboarding.title: Welcome aboard!
onboarding.subtitle: Let's get your profile set up so you can start claiming exclusive territories.

errors.no-session: User session not found. Please refresh the page.
errors.save-failed: Could not save your profile. Please try again.

account.heading: Agency Profile
account.name: Agency Name
account.billing-helper: Sets the currency used when claiming exclusive territories.

inbound.email-helper: Where should we send your candidate and client leads? (Leave blank to use your login email)

industries.heading: Covered Industries
industries.helper: Select the industries your agency covers

claim.leads: Claim an exclusive region to start receiving leads from that area

map.description: Use the map to select which region's you cover

claim.step-2-helper: Select the upcoming months you want to receive leads for.
claim.click-map: Click regions on the map to begin.
claim.agency-profile-helper: Showing industries from your Agency Profile.

edit.title: Edit Schedule
edit.subtitle: Add exclusive months to your {name} plan.
edit.not-found-helper: We couldn't find this territory in your active plans.

schedule.empty-state: Select "Ongoing" or specific months to build your schedule.
schedule.helper-basic: * Ongoing Basic plans get the first month completely free.
schedule.helper-exclusive: * Exclusive upgrades are secured today by paying the upgrade difference upfront. Your standard basic rate will be billed normally during the exclusive month.

leads.title: My Leads
leads.subtitle: Manage your inbound leads and Lead Contact Card settings.
leads.empty: No leads found yet. Claim territories and set up your Lead Contact Card to get started.
leads.general-helper: These details will be used as the default for your contact cards.
leads.wildcard-helper: Tip: Include {wildcard} in your title or content fields to automatically insert the candidate's searched location.
leads.custom-colours-helper: Personalize your header and button colors.
leads.category-helper: Override the general content message for specific industries. If left blank, the general content will be used.
leads.no-categories: You have not selected any covered industries in your profile.

preview.live-helper: See how your contact card looks to candidates.
preview.default-content: We would love to hear from you. Please leave your details below and one of our experts will be in touch.

fields.title: Lead Contact Card Title
fields.category-placeholder: Why should candidates contact you about {category}...
